name: Nozomi Tenma
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Nozomi is a 27 year old former professional cage fighter. She had to retire because she found out that she has a detached retina and couldn't continue as a professional anymore. She then started underground fighting, but then got fired because her fights were "boring". But then she comes across the idea of creating a underground fighting organization for women and is a manager of said organization. She's also the caretaker of Hina Hongou because she's the only one who has at l

name: Ooyama
description: Ooyama is an ordinary school boy and unlike others, does not possess any angel ability like fighting skills or special powers. He is scared of fighting and is the shota-type guy of the anime. ~!Before joining the SSS, Ooyama was Hinata's roommate, and was originally mistaken to be an NPC whom Hinata frequently talks to about his experiences with Yuri. However, when Ooyama began to show human emotion and worries about Hinata's well-being, Hinata realizes that Ooyama is actually a human. Ooyama is

name: Pina
description: is Silica's Feathered Little Dragon and the first known monster to be tamed in Sword Art Online. It understands Silica's commands and will protect her in any way it can, as it is her «Tamed Monster». It is also present in ALfheim Online as her Cait Sith familiar.

name: Prospera Mercury
nativeName: プロスペラ・マーキュリー
description: The CEO of the Shin Sei Development Corporation, which is headquartered at Mercury. She was in charge of the Gundam Aerial's development, and is Suletta's mother. She always wears special headgear for physical support.
mediaTitles: Mobile Suit Gundam: The Witch from Mercury

name: Pucca
description: Pucca is an 11-year-old South Korean superhuman girl who constantly tries to hug and kiss a ninja-in-training named Garu. She is the niece of Uncle Dumpling, Ho, and Linguini and lives with them at the Goh-Rong Restaurant, where she works as a delivery girl. She drives around on her red scooter, making deliveries to the people of the town. She usually delivers Jajang Noodles. (Source: Pucca Wiki, edited)

name: Regina
description: Regina is the [King Jikochuu's](https://anilist.co/character/86963/King-Jikochuu) daughter and acts as his second in command. Over the course of the series, she strikes up a friendship with [Aida Mana](https://anilist.co/character/75220/Mana-Aida). Regina is selfish, vain, and spoiled. She treats everyone like a peasant and hates anyone who is more beautiful than her. She threatens the Selfish Trio if they don't do what she wants. She is also playful and clings to [Mana](https://anilist.co/chara

name: Ren
description: __Height:__ 130 cm One of Yuzu's fellow attendants at Konohatei. She's more cynical than she seems.

name: Ritsuka Takesaka
description: Hair: Waist Length, White Eyes: Violet Body: E+ Cup, Young-adult Personality: Brocon, Serious, Smart, Strict Role: Cousin, Full Sister, Lawyer, Older Sister The eldest daughter of the Takesaka household. A rookie lawyer, she is a cool and strict person. Continues to look after the younger brother in place of parent's absence, and she is quite doting too.

name: Roberto
description: A big, burly man and one of the many people from the orphanage 511 Kinderheim that Johan controls. He admires Johan very much, and often acts as Johan's bodyguard and henchman. He is also a professional hitman with substantial proficiency. ~!His true name, already forgotten by himself, is Adolf Reinhart. Wolfgang Grimmer is the only person who remembered him and also considered him as a friend in the their childhood at the orphanage. He was shot by Tenma in chapter 73 and seemed to fall into a s

name: Ruri Hibarigaoka
description: Her caring and good personality gets her caught up in many unhappy encounters with those who drag her into calamities. She has been attracted to a "certain person" to no avail for a long time. Because both of her parents are currently on assignment abroad, she's living alone. She is very good at cooking.

name: Seong-Je Geum
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'10") Wolf Keum is a supporting antagonist in Weak Hero. Wolf is the representative of Ganghak High School and the newest member of the Yeongdeungpo Union, holding the fifth ranking on the Shuttle Patch website. He is known for his overly cruel and violent nature, as stated by Eugene when talking about the Union.

name: Shigaraki
description: A Tanuki that appeared when Kohina Ichimatsu was performing Kokkuri-san's ritual. He ended up going with the flow and slowly settled into the Kohina's house with Inugami and Kokkuri-san. It is mentioned that Shigaraki lived in the same house as Kokkuri-san and often caused trouble for him in the past. Shown to love gambling and alcohol.

name: Suisse
description: __Capital:__ Bern __Language:__ German, French, Italian, and Romansh Switzerland is a country tucked in between the Alps who has the reputation of being an eternally neutral nation. He has blonde hair cut in a bob just above his shoulders. In earlier artwork, his eyes were colored blue, but in more recent artwork and in the anime adaptation, his eyes are colored green. When they were children, Switzerland was close to Austria. Switzerland spent most of his days bailing out and saving Austria, wh

name: Sylphy
mediaTitles: A Nobody's Way Up to an Exploration Hero
searchTerms: A Nobody's Way Up to an Exploration Hero

name: Tadashi Karino
description: Birthday: September 9 Tadashi ranks 5th in school and is the son of the school's director. He suffers from a bit of wanderlust, likes to travel alone and do whatever he wants or sees fit. He enjoys eating sweets, especially food made by Akira. He seems to end up as the character most comically attacked (frequently by Akira) because of his careless comments or reckless behavior. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Thirteen
description: Thirteen is an ordinary human from Hole. He is friends with Bauks and has a crush on Nikaido.

name: Vlad III
description: Lancer of "Black" ("黒"のランサー, "Kuro" no Ransā) is the Lancer-class Servant of Darnic Prestone Yggdmillennia of the Black Faction in the Great Holy Grail War of Fate/Apocrypha. Lancer's True Name is Vlad III (ヴラド三世, Vurado Sansei), the Lord Impaler (串刺し公, Kushizashi Kō) (1431-1476), the greatest hero of Wallachia, whose feats in war caused him to be known fearsomely as the "Impaling Prince" to the Turks. name: Won-Seok Chae
description: He is one of the few members left in Hostel B and Sally Park's best friend. (Source: Lookism Wikia)
